display_text: Monkey King Aghanim's Scepter: Wukong's Command spawns monkey soldiers at regular intervals. This upgrade counters high-ground defense and siege scenarios by overwhelming enemy structures with continuous reinforcements, especially when Monkey King is nearby. Soldiers can now independently charge Jingu Mastery, making Monkey King a relentless split-push threat.
search_text: Monkey King Aghanim Scepter counter-defensive counter-siege split-push siege high-ground defense split-push threat

display_text: Monkey King Aghanim's Shard: Boundless Strike applies Primal Spring effects, transforming Monkey King into a versatile initiator and escape artist. This upgrade counters clumped enemy teams by delivering AoE damage and stuns, while also enabling Monkey King to leap to safety or reposition during fights.
search_text: Monkey King Aghanim Shard counter-clump anti-grouping AoE damage initiation escape reposition
